summary: The user sought assistance in organizing references for their thesis project and formatting citations in APA style. They submitted their thesis proposal on the same day and used Mendeley as their citation tool, asking for guidance on entering references and understanding in-text citations for various source types.
facts: The user submitted their thesis proposal to their department on the same day they sought help with citations. The user is using Mendeley as their citation tool for their thesis project. The user is trying to stay organized and accurate with their references for their thesis. The user asked for examples of how to cite sources with multiple authors in APA style. The user inquired about the necessity of including the ISSN in their references. The user requested guidance on formatting in-text citations and reference list entries for different types of sources in APA style.
